LanguageData.VAE_CasualWear.description: Craft casual wear with handy features for any life situation.
LanguageData.VAE_CasualWear.label: casual wear
LanguageData.VAE_FormalWear.label: formal wear
LanguageData.VAE_MilitaryClothing.description: Craft weatherproof outfits to protect your soldiers.
LanguageData.VAE_MilitaryClothing.label: military clothing
LanguageData.VAE_SterileAttire.description: Craft sterile attire used by doctors and scientists.
LanguageData.VAE_SterileAttire.label: sterile attire
LanguageData.VAE_WorkAttire.description: Craft comfortable and and functional attire for any kind of work.
LanguageData.VAE_WorkAttire.label: work attire
LanguageData.VAE_HazardProtection.description: Develop suits resistant to high toxicity and radiation.
LanguageData.VAE_HazardProtection.label: hazard protection
LanguageData.VAE_LeatherTanning.description: Learn the process of tanning to craft more thicker and durable armors.
LanguageData.VAE_LeatherTanning.label: leather tanning
LanguageData.VAE_MlitaryCamouflage.description: Craft special military apparel allowing users to resemble the background environment such as foliage.
LanguageData.VAE_MlitaryCamouflage.label: military camouflage
